positive: A stylized, clean silhouette of a majestic mountain landscape at sunrise. The scene features sharp, crisp peaks and deep valleys, rendered in a highly contrasted, monochromatic blue and orange palette (gradient fill). Include stylized flora like pine trees and simple geometric water elements. The composition should be perfectly centered and vertically balanced, ideal for a t-shirt graphic print. Minimalist design, vector art style, strong negative space, vibrant gradients, high contrast, symmetry, perfect composition, breathable printable graphic.
